bibl.title: Śabdabhedanirūpaṇa
bibl.note: Raghavan intro to Śāhendravilāsa, pg. 34 — 3 different works of the same name (on primary, secondary, and suggestive śabdaśakti) were produced at the behest of Śāhaji by Rāmabhadra Dīkṣita and his pupils Nārāyaṇa and Veṅkaṭakṛṣṇa.

Tanjore Descriptive Catalogue lists Ms 5301 as authored by Rāmabhadramakhin, containing 'two more works with the similar name by different authors'. 5302 is authored by Veṅkaṭakṛṣṇa, and 5303 by Nārāyaṇa.
